title: Pituitary result review
source_review_basis: full authoritative documents inspected and archived; item-level retain/rewrite/remove/add comparisons recorded

assessment.text: Supports pituitary imaging review, visual fields, and visual-acuity documentation in recommendation-qualified contexts.

source.title: Pituitary incidentaloma: a Pituitary Society international consensus guideline statement
source.population: Adults with pituitary incidentalomas, with symptom, lesion, endocrine, pregnancy, visual, and surgical qualifiers.
source.setting: Pituitary incidentaloma clinical evaluation, endocrine testing, imaging, visual assessment, consultation, and follow-up.
source.exclusions: Partial for a broad pituitary-symptoms workflow. Exact only for selected headache, visual, endocrine-symptom, hormone-profile, imaging, visual-field, and referral documentation; diagnosis, hormone replacement, treatment, and UAE pathways remain clinician responsibilities.
source.evidence_paraphrase: Supports pituitary hormone-profile review and relevant reproductive or prolactin symptom context without inferring hormone deficiency or excess.

assessment.text: Supports pituitary hormone-profile review and relevant reproductive or prolactin symptom context without inferring hormone deficiency or excess.
assessment.rationale: The exact hormone-evaluation section supports recording result source and date, associated endocrine symptoms, relevant negatives and clinician-reviewed laboratory results without inferring hormone excess or deficiency.

assessment.text: Supports pituitary imaging review, visual fields, and visual-acuity documentation in recommendation-qualified contexts.
assessment.rationale: The exact imaging and visual section supports focused assessment and existing specialist correspondence when relevant; it does not recommend imaging or interpret a lesion.

assessment.text: Supports endocrinology or neurosurgery consultation documentation in qualified severe-headache, visual-deficit, hormone-symptom, lesion, or pregnancy contexts.
assessment.rationale: The exact consultation section supports clinician concern, patient questions, an entered plan, safety net and arranged follow-up only when documented.
